content:
MODULE: cosmos.knowledge.loader
FILE: cosmos/knowledge/loader.py (163 lines)
CATEGORY: knowledge

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS KNOWLEDGE LOADER
Loads API references and knowledge on startup.
ALWAYS APPENDS - never overwrites existing knowledge.

This module integrates with the memory system to ensure
persistent knowledge across restarts.

CLASSES:
- KnowledgeLoader: Loads and manages persistent knowledge.
Integrates with Cosmos's memory system.
  Methods: def load_knowledge_file(self, filepath: Path) -> Optional[Dict]
  Methods: def load_all(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def get(self, key: str, default: Any=None) -> Any
  Methods: def get_api_reference(self, api_name: str) -> Optional[Dict]
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> Dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_knowledge_loader() -> KnowledgeLoader
- def load_all_knowledge() -> Dict[str, Any]
- def get_api_reference(api_name: str) -> Optional[Dict]
